name: AiCoding Tagging Policy
rules: Platform releases use vMAJOR.MINOR.PATCH only and exclude vYYYY.MM.DD date tags.
Milestones use milestone/YYYY.MM.DD-<name>; legacy vYYYY.MM.DD tags are historical only.
Do not force delete or reuse immutable release tags.
Do not push corrective tags without explicit confirmation.
